design.detail: design.md references requirement IDs not present in any baseline spec
design.rule: References only requirement ids present in specs

proposal.detail: `## Why` section missing or has no prose
proposal.rule: Has a Why section with at least one sentence
Has a Crates/Features section listing at least one entry

specs.detail: one or more requirements have no scenarios
specs.rule: Every requirement has at least one scenario

specs.detail: one or more requirement IDs do not match `^REQ-[0-9]{3}$`

specs.rule: Uses SHALL/MUST language for normative requirements

tasks.detail: found `- …` bullets that do not match the `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format
tasks.rule: All tasks use `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format

cross_checks.detail: one or more crates/features listed in the proposal have no matching spec file
cross_checks.rule: Every crate/feature listed in the proposal has a matching spec file

cross_checks.detail: design.md references requirement IDs that are not present in the baseline
cross_checks.rule: Every requirement id referenced in design.md exists in specs
